jamDesk.description: View, manage your terminals inside an infinite canvas. Inspired by the Cate IDE.
jamDesk.command.open.title: Open Canvas
jamDesk.command.addNote.title: Add Note
jamDesk.command.addTerminal.title: Add Terminal
jamDesk.command.addBrowser.title: Add Browser
jamDesk.command.addFile.title: Add File Card…
jamDesk.command.addCurrentFile.title: Add Active File to Canvas
jamDesk.command.fitToScreen.title: Fit Canvas to Screen
jamDesk.command.autoLayout.title: Auto-Layout Canvas
jamDesk.command.resetView.title: Reset Canvas View (Zoom 100%)
jamDesk.command.export.title: Export Canvas to JSON…
jamDesk.command.import.title: Import Canvas from JSON…
jamDesk.command.clear.title: Clear Canvas
jamDesk.config.gridStyle.description: Background grid style for the canvas.
jamDesk.config.snapToGrid.description: Snap nodes to the grid (and to neighbor edges) when moving or resizing. Hold Alt to bypass.
jamDesk.config.zoomSpeed.description: Multiplier for wheel / trackpad zoom speed.
jamDesk.config.showMinimap.description: Show the minimap overview in the corner of the canvas.
jamDesk.config.agentNotifications.descri: Show a desktop notification when a coding agent in a terminal finishes its task or starts waiting for your input.
jamDesk.config.customLaunchers.descripti: Custom toolbar buttons that open a terminal and run a command. Each entry is { "label": "...", "command": "..." }.
jamDesk.config.customLaunchers.label.des: Button text shown in the toolbar.
jamDesk.config.customLaunchers.command.d: Command typed into the new terminal (e.g. "claude --resume").
